enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

En Mel Vizhundha expresses deep feelings of love and longing, depicting the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In May Madham, the song plays during a pivotal romantic scene, enhancing the emotional connection between the characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of K.S. Chitra and P. Jayachandran.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for En Mel Vizhundha was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

The song was released on September 9, 1994.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song En Mel Vizhundha from May Madham encapsulates the tender emotions of love and longing. It beautifully portrays the feelings of a lover reminiscing about cherished moments. The soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This romantic duet is perfect for intimate occasions, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Mel Vizhundha is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.S. Chitra and P. Jayachandran, paired with A.R. Rahman's soulful composition, this song transports listeners to a realm of deep emotions. Experience the magic of May Madham as it weaves a tale of romance and nostalgia.
stanzaMeanings: You have been here for so many days, today my poem is written for you, you have been here for so many days.
Like a flower that calls me, you have been here for so many days, like the sweet music that enchanted me, you have been here for so many days.
Like a soul speaking from the body, I was within you.
You have been here for so many days, today my poem is written for you, you have been here for so many days.
If the earth opens, water will be there, if my heart opens, you will be there, if the sound opens, music will be there, if my life opens, you will be there.
If the sky opens, rain will be there, if my stomach opens, you will be there, if the night opens, day will be there, if my future opens, you will be there.
You have been here for so many days, today my poem is written for you, you have been here for so many days.
In the conversation of the trees and flowers, what language do they speak? In the conversation of the waves and shores, what language do they speak?
In the conversation of the earth and sky, what language do they speak? If both eyes speak, will the language be silence?
You have been here for so many days, today my poem is written for you, you have been here for so many days.
Like a flower that calls me, you have been here for so many days, like the sweet music that enchanted me, you have been here for so many days.
Like a soul speaking from the body, I was within you.
You have been here for so many days, today my poem is written for you, you have been here for so many days.
